entries.summary: Desktop app uses Electron 41.2.1 via electron-vite with main/preload/renderer split
IPC bridge has 63 invoke handles, 5 send channels, 7 push channels — all typed via ipc-contract.ts
Sidecar architecture: opencode server runs as Electron utilityProcess worker thread
Health endpoint at /api/global/health is a stub — always returns {healthy: true} with no actual checks
Database layer uses PGlite (embedded Postgres) by default, falls back to node-postgres for remote
Global.Path uses XDG paths: ~/.local/share/opencode for data, ~/.config/opencode for config
native/ directory referenced in electron-builder config does NOT exist on disk
Auto-update via electron-updater, enabled only when packaged and non-dev channel
Unresponsive sampler collects JS call stacks at 1s intervals for 15s during renderer hangs
macOS notarization enabled, hardened runtime with all JIT exceptions
